Crabs: photo index

crustacea text index | photo index Phylum Arthropoda

Subphylum Crustacea > Class Malacostraca Order Decapoda Photo index of crabs on Singapore shores
including crab-like animals

small
body width < 3 cm small with long eyestalks
body width < 3cm medium

body width 3-5cm large
body width >5cm swimming crabs
(last pair of legs paddle-shaped) These are NOT true crabs hermit crabs
(crab-like in shells) tiny porcelain crabs
3 pairs of walking legs
(instead of 4 pairs as in true crabs)     horseshoe crabs

crustaceans on this site

body width <2 cm
small with long eyestalks

3 pairs walking legs

swimming crabs
last pair of legs paddle-shaped
